prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, optimize the melting temperature (Tm) of Nucleoprotein (NP) (viral nucleoprotein (RNA-binding scaffold)) from Influenza A virus (A/Hong Kong/212/2003/37/2005(H5N1)). describe a computational strategy for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
